attributes.action: Legalise Cannabis in the United Kingdom with Responsible Regulations
attributes.additional_details:
The current approach to cannabis in the UK is outdated and ineffective. Criminalisation:
Wastes police resources on non-violent offences
Fuels illegal markets and unregulated products
Prevents safe education and harm reduction
Reduce crime by removing profits from illegal trade
Generate tax revenue to support public services, including healthcare and education
Ensure safer, tested products for consumers
Respect the rights of responsible adults while maintaining public order
attributes.background: legalise cannabis under a clear, controlled, and responsible framework that prioritises public health, safety, and personal freedom Allow adults to legally possess and use cannabis.Permit households to grow a maximum of three cannabis plants per residence for personal use.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Legalise and regulate cannabis for adults across the United Kingdom
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760967
